items.title: S01E01 - Tomkinson's Schooldays
items.summary: Set in the frontier days of British education, when upper lips were stiff with cold and corporal punishment was an A-level. A savage, searing indictment of something or other.

infolabels.title: Tomkinson's Schooldays
infolabels.plot: Set in the frontier days of British education, when upper lips were stiff with cold and corporal punishment was an A-level. A savage, searing indictment of something or other.

items.title: S01E02 - The Testing of Eric Olthwaite
items.summary: A boy becomes a man in the harsh world of the Depression. The rough, tough story of folk who couldn't afford to go on the Jarrow March.

infolabels.title: The Testing of Eric Olthwaite
infolabels.plot: A boy becomes a man in the harsh world of the Depression. The rough, tough story of folk who couldn't afford to go on the Jarrow March.

items.title: S01E03 - Escape From Stalag Luft 112B
items.summary: A tale of courage and valour behind the lines in the Kaiser's Germany. An inspiring story of camp life and a British officer who wouldn't lie down.

infolabels.title: Escape From Stalag Luft 112B
infolabels.plot: A tale of courage and valour behind the lines in the Kaiser's Germany. An inspiring story of camp life and a British officer who wouldn't lie down.

items.title: S01E04 - Murder at Moorstones Manor
items.summary: Hugo and Dora drive down to see Mumsie and Dadsie-pie for a long weekend in the country. But their tophole weekend turns out to be longer than they thought.

infolabels.title: Murder at Moorstones Manor
infolabels.plot: Hugo and Dora drive down to see Mumsie and Dadsie-pie for a long weekend in the country. But their tophole weekend turns out to be longer than they thought.

items.title: S01E05 - Across the Andes by Frog
items.summary: The epic story of one man and six frogs who tried to defy the world in the greatest gamble of all.

infolabels.title: Across the Andes by Frog
infolabels.plot: The epic story of one man and six frogs who tried to defy the world in the greatest gamble of all.

items.title: S01E06 - The Curse of the Claw
items.summary: The terrifying story of a man who dabbled in the dark mysteries of the Orient, and lived to tell the tale. Or did he?

infolabels.title: The Curse of the Claw
infolabels.plot: The terrifying story of a man who dabbled in the dark mysteries of the Orient, and lived to tell the tale. Or did he?

items.title: S02E01 - Whinfrey's Last Case
items.summary: Dashing, debonair Gerald Whinfrey saves his country twice a week. But in 1913 a German plot - to start the First World War without telling anyone - coincides with his holiday. Where will Whinfrey's priorities lie? A knock-about tale of international intrigue.

infolabels.title: Whinfrey's Last Case
infolabels.plot: Dashing, debonair Gerald Whinfrey saves his country twice a week. But in 1913 a German plot - to start the First World War without telling anyone - coincides with his holiday. Where will Whinfrey's priorities lie? A knock-about tale of international intrigue.

items.title: S02E02 - Golden Gordon
items.summary: A rare look at football fanaticism in the 1930s. Superfan Gordon Ottershaw supports a team which has not won a match for six years. But worse is to come. Will their tragedy bring Gordon's triumph? Or not? These are some of the questions this film hopes to answer. Or not.

infolabels.title: Golden Gordon
infolabels.plot: A rare look at football fanaticism in the 1930s. Superfan Gordon Ottershaw supports a team which has not won a match for six years. But worse is to come. Will their tragedy bring Gordon's triumph? Or not? These are some of the questions this film hopes to answer. Or not.

items.title: S02E03 - Roger of the Raj
items.summary: Pubescent Roger Bartlesham comes of age in the turbulent India of 60 years ago, when circumstances beyond his control drive him towards the most deplorable act known to the British Army.

infolabels.title: Roger of the Raj
infolabels.plot: Pubescent Roger Bartlesham comes of age in the turbulent India of 60 years ago, when circumstances beyond his control drive him towards the most deplorable act known to the British Army.
